'''Vygar''' was a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], and the original owner of the ''[[Death Mark]]'' which they integrated into [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']].<ref name="Zirtran's Anchor (article)" />
